name: Northamerican Energy Group Corporation
summary: Northamerican Energy Group Corporation engages in the identification, acquisition, and development of hydrocarbon, oil, and gas reserves. It has gas and oil production leases located in the Pecos Valley Field, southwest of Midland, Texas, and Permian Basin. The company, formerly known as Nuoasis Properties Inc. and changed its name to Northamerican Energy Group Corporation in May 2005. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Houston, Texas.
